title: Bedding/Linen * Homelessness Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Basic Needs > Bedding/Linen * Homelessness Issues 4 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter AIDS/HIV Homelessness Issues Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF COMMUNITY SHARING PROGRAM ASSISTANCE FOR PEOPLE WITHOUT HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides laundry, showers, propane, tarps, and blankets. Also provides sleeping bags when available. 1440 Birch Avenue Cottage Grove, OR 97424 Eligibility: Individuals who self-identify as homeless Hours: Monday 1:30pm-6pm, Tuesday-Friday 11am-3:30pm Email (541) 942-2176 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HYGIENE4ALL HYGIENE4ALL HUB Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a community hygiene, sanitation, and safety hub. Provides showers, bedding in exchange for soiled, a clothing swap, menstruation and moontime hygiene supplies, first-aid kits, bathrooms, legal disposal for household trash and needles, foot, wound, and mouth care, and a warm outdoor space with coffee and tea. Also offers paid work and opportunities for advocacy. 824 SE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97214 Eligibility: Homeless individuals and families Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 3pm-8:30pm Open regardless of weather. Last shower 45 minutes before close. Search for Hygiene4all Hub on Google Maps for unanticipated holiday or other closures. Email (971) 236-2524 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OPERATION NIGHTWATCH DOWNTOWN HOSPITALITY CENTER HOSPITALITY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a safe place where guests can drop in and socialize, play games, and read books. The center provides water, coffee, a hot meal, blankets, socks, and mental health services. 1432 SW 13th Avenue Portland, OR 97201 Eligibility: People experiencing housing insecurity Hours: Thursday-Saturday 6:30pm-10pm Email (503) 220-0438 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF LANE COUNTY EUGENE SERVICE STATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a day center. Services include laundry facilities, showers, meals, phone access, voicemail services, clothing, blankets, personal care supplies, job search assistance, and information and referral to other services. Visitors can use indoor, climate-controlled seating and outdoor, shaded picnic tables. 450 Highway 99 N Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Low-income and homeless adults without minor children Hours: 7 days per week 8:30am-5pm Breakfast: 7 days per week 8:30am Lunch: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday/Saturday/Sunday noon, Wednesday 11am Showers and laundry: 7 days per week 8:30am-noon and 2pm-5pm Email (541) 689-6747 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY SHARING PROGRAM ASSISTANCE FOR PEOPLE WITHOUT HOUSING HYGIENE4ALL HYGIENE4ALL HUB OPERATION NIGHTWATCH HOSPITALITY CENTER ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF LANE COUNTY EUGENE SERVICE STATION
